Metadata.homeTitle: Alquiler Karaoke | Professional karaoke & event experiences
Metadata.homeDescription: We create professional karaoke and event experiences for individuals, companies, weddings and parties across Spain. Request your quote.

Home.heroTitle: We don't rent a machine: we build an experience
Home.heroSubtitle: Professional karaoke, sound, lighting and events for individuals, companies, weddings and parties across Spain.
Home.servicesSubtitle: Everything you need for an event that sounds and looks professional.
Home.ctaBandText: Tell us what you need and we'll prepare a tailored quote, no strings attached.

items.title: Professional karaoke
items.text: Gear, screens and thousands of songs, with or without a technician.

items.title: OkeBox
items.text: Self-contained karaoke to keep it all day at your event.

items.title: DJ & mobile disco
items.text: Music and atmosphere so the party never stops.

items.title: Sound & lighting
items.text: Professional equipment adapted to every venue.

items.title: Events & contests
items.text: Game-show style and musical dynamics for companies and parties.

items.title: Individuals
items.text: Birthdays, hen/stag parties and home or venue celebrations.

items.title: Companies
items.text: Team events, parties and brand activations.

items.title: Weddings
items.text: The finishing touch to make your wedding unforgettable.

items.title: Local festivals
items.text: Town councils and clubs with professional production.

steps.title: Tell us about your event
steps.text: Date, place and what you have in mind.

steps.title: Tailored quote
steps.text: We propose the best option, no strings attached.

steps.title: Professional setup
steps.text: We bring and set up all the equipment.

steps.title: Enjoy
steps.text: You sing; we handle the rest.
